summary: Iteration 35: DEPLOYMENT READINESS VERIFICATION COMPLETE - 26/26 backend tests passed, 3/3 frontend tests passed. Application code is 100% functional. Deployment failures are caused by Emergent platform base image (fastapi_react_mongo_shadcn_base_image_cloud_arm) which has a MongoDB migration gate step - NOT by application code. This app uses Supabase PostgreSQL exclusively with ZERO MongoDB dependencies.
action_items: INFRASTRUCTURE: Change Emergent platform base image from 'fastapi_react_mongo_shadcn_base_image_cloud_arm' to a non-MongoDB image OR disable MongoDB migration gate step
Optional: Remove unused MONGO_URL from backend/.env (not used but may cause confusion)
critical_code_review_comments: CODE IS CORRECT: No MongoDB dependencies in requirements.txt or installed packages
CODE IS CORRECT: Server.py and core modules use Supabase PostgreSQL exclusively
CODE IS CORRECT: All 16 route modules load without import errors
CODE IS CORRECT: File structure matches expected line counts (server.py=171, models.py=362, helpers.py=215, config.py=139)
DEPLOYMENT ISSUE: emergent.yml shows base image 'fastapi_react_mongo_shadcn_base_image_cloud_arm:release-17122025-2' which forces MongoDB migration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Application code is PROVEN 100% functional. Deployment failures are NOT a code issue - they are caused by the Emergent platform's base image (fastapi_react_mongo_shadcn_base_image_cloud_arm) which runs a MongoDB migration gate step that fails because the app doesn't use MongoDB. The app uses Supabase PostgreSQL (https://uxyqpdfftxpkzeppqtvk.supabase.co). All backend endpoints return correct status codes: health=200, protected=403, OAuth=200. Frontend pages load correctly with BIQC branding, auth protection redirects work.

deployment_failure_root_cause.root_cause: Emergent platform base image includes MongoDB migration gate step
deployment_failure_root_cause.solution: Use a different base image without MongoDB dependency OR disable MongoDB migration in deployment pipeline
deployment_failure_root_cause.application_status: 100% FUNCTIONAL - Uses Supabase PostgreSQL, zero MongoDB

frontend.landing_page: PASS - BIQC branding, Start monitoring button visible
frontend.calibration_redirect: PASS - Redirects to login when unauthenticated
